# Session: 2026-04-14 — Registry collision resolution, D-number authority restructure, citation standard, Rule 22
<!-- SECTION-H: passthrough to for-ClaudeCode.zip — do not edit -->
**2026-04-14 (Registry collision resolution, D-number authority restructure, citation standard, Rule 22).** Major governance session. Root cause analysis of D-163–D-169 registry collision block: decision-registry.md and decisions-active.md had diverged — registry held seven Code-assigned numbers (D-163–D-169) that collided with existing Chat-assigned decisions at those same numbers in decisions-active.md. Resolution: six missing decisions written with canonical D-numbers D-310–D-315; registry corrected; all cross-references updated across canonical documents. Three structural decisions locked to prevent recurrence: D-317 (Code reads registry for lookup only — D-number assignment restricted to Design Session), D-316 (title-first citation standard and permanent number stability), D-318 (registry always travels in for-ClaudeCode.zip). Rule 22 (Solution Completeness Check, D-319) added to project-instructions.md Design Session rules — displayed four-question check required before any executable proposal. Three deferred items added: D-Rule23-Retro (review Rule 22 effectiveness after 5–10 sessions), D-HistoricalLogSeparation (separate historical log from current state in project-briefing.md), amendment to D-Session-Orchestration-MCP (elevated priority — build-c-decisions.md visibility gap confirmed as instance of the split-view structural problem). Section F instructions update seven canonical documents. Section H deliverable: claude-code-session-rules.md and CLAUDE.md repo update instructions. decisions-active → v3.55-active. decision-registry → v3.9. build-c-spec.md → v2.3. project-instructions.md → v2.30. project-briefing.md → v5.78. deferred-items.md → v1.27.
